holdings.infoBox: GAUD is an equity ETF with a total of 32 individual holdings. The top holdings are Texas Instruments stock at 5.71%, Cisco Systems at 5.13%, QUALCOMM at 4.00%, Mondelez International at 3.75%, and Johnson & Johnson at 3.74%.

overview.description: The Guinness Atkinson US Dividend Builder ETF (GAUD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively manages a narrow selection of stocks of US companies that have consistently grown their dividends. The portfolio is equally weighted. GAUD was launched on Dec 19, 2025 and is issued by Guinness Atkinson.
